---
title: "Cultural and Human Capital Signals in Hiring"
subtitle: "A Factorial Survey Experiment Across Contexts<br>Burchartz L, De Keere K, Geven, S. 2026. *Br. J. Sociol.*"
author: "報告担当｜濱田 樹"
date: "2026/06/10"
date-format: "YYYY/MM/DD"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, custom.scss]
    slide-number: c
    show-slide-number: all
    # width: 1600
    # height: 900
    fig-width: 4.5
    fig-height: 3
    fig-dpi: 320
    controls: false
    progress: false
    scrollable: true
    embed-resources: false
---
